completed: Preview chapter payloads now expose source counts without exposing the underlying citation library.
SourcesPage now shows anonymous readers a gated chapter-by-chapter source summary and signed-in readers the full bibliography.
SearchPage now uses a server-backed /api/search endpoint that returns preview-safe results anonymously and full source-text matches after sign-in.
Verification completed with npx tsc --noEmit, npm run build, local API checks, and live anonymous/authenticated search validation.
next_task: Add signed-in evidence/source filters to search and the source browser, then finish portal-side growth infrastructure in HubSpot, GA4, and Search Console.
next_priorities: Add evidence-tier, source-only, and source-hierarchy filters to signed-in search and source browsing without weakening anonymous preview rules.
Connect HubSpot workflows, double opt-in, and lifecycle scoring in the portal.
Connect Google Search Console and verify production funnel events in GA4 plus HubSpot.
